summary: Set up a new research project with protocol development, ethics planning, data management plan, team coordination, and milestone scheduling.

inputs.name: research_objective
inputs.description: The primary research objective or question.

inputs.name: team_composition
inputs.description: Team members, roles, and institutional affiliations.

inputs.name: funding_context
inputs.description: Funding source, budget constraints, and grant requirements.

outputs.name: ethics_plan
outputs.description: Ethics review plan with IRB or equivalent requirements.

outputs.name: milestone_schedule
outputs.description: Project timeline with milestones and deliverables.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is research project setup, not a product or software project.
Require a defined research objective before protocol development.
Verify ethics and data management plans are documented.
All project documents must be internally consistent and reference each other.

steps.action: Refine the research objective into specific, measurable questions.
Design the research methodology with sampling and measurement strategy.
Develop ethics review plan and IRB application requirements.
Create a FAIR-compliant data management plan.
Build project timeline with milestones, dependencies, and risk register.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing templates and prior project documents.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save project protocol, DMP, and milestone schedule.

tools.name: web.search
tools.purpose: Search for funder requirements and ethical guidelines.

verification.method: Verify protocol covers objectives, methods, ethics, and data management.
Verify milestones are achievable within stated constraints.
Verify ethics plan covers consent, privacy, and IRB requirements.

success_criteria: A complete research protocol document is produced.
Ethics and data management plans meet institutional requirements.
Project timeline has clear milestones with dependencies mapped.

rollback.when: If the protocol lacks essential sections, restart from the missing component.
